info.title: ScaledTest API
info.description: ScaledTest scales out end-to-end testing with unparalleled reporting and capabilities. This API provides CTRF report ingestion, distributed test execution, quality gate evaluation, webhook notifications, and analytics.

get.description: Returns a signed CSRF token. The SPA must include this token in the X-CSRF-Token header on mutation requests.

post.description: Uses the httpOnly refresh_token cookie to issue a new access token.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Filter reports created after this time

parameters.name: until
parameters.description: Filter reports created before this time

post.description: Ingests a CTRF-formatted test report. Requires maintainer or owner role.
Launches a distributed test execution. Requires maintainer or owner role.

get.summary: List API tokens for a team

post.description: Creates a team-scoped API token. The full token value is returned only once.

post.summary: Evaluate a quality gate against a report

get.summary: List evaluation history for a gate

post.description: Creates a webhook. The plaintext secret is returned only once.

get.summary: Get duration history for a test

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile information.

patch.description: Updates the display name of the authenticated user.

post.description: Changes the password for the currently authenticated user. Requires the current password for verification.

get.summary: List pending invitations for a team

post.summary: Invite a user to a team
post.description: Creates an invitation for the given email address. Requires maintainer or owner role. Sends an invitation email if SMTP is configured.

token.description: Plain-text invitation token (shown once). Used to construct the accept URL.

delete.description: Deletes a pending invitation. Requires maintainer or owner role.

get.description: Returns invitation details (email, role, team name) for display on the accept page. Public endpoint — no authentication required.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Plain-text invitation token from the invite email

post.summary: Accept an invitation and create account
post.description: Creates a new user account (or updates an existing one) and adds the user to the team. Public endpoint — no authentication required.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Plain-text invitation token from the invite email

200.description: Invitation accepted, user created and added to team

bearerAuth.description: JWT access token (from /auth/login) or API token (sct_ prefix from team token creation)

name.description: Computed display name derived from tool_name and tool_version (e.g., 'playwright v1.50.1', 'jest', or 'Report <short-id>' if tool_name is empty)

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: CTRF test report ingestion and retrieval
